title: Nginx CORS Preflight Example
summary: Handle CORS preflight requests in Nginx for one API origin.
verification_setup: Install Nginx on a staging host.
Replace the sample frontend origin, allowed methods, allowed headers, and sample upstream before validation.
Use a browser or HTTP client that can send an OPTIONS preflight request during validation.
verification_command: Manual verification only; see README.md for the staging checklist.
verification_notes: Not executed. The example uses documented Nginx add_header and return directives, but it still requires nginx -t and a real preflight request against a staging host before use.
